Video.summary: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Elhadji Ndour v. Calum Robb.

Video.summary: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Achraf Ouchen vs. Elhadji Ndour

Video.summary: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Andras Virag vs. Adham Sabry
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Andras Virag vs. Adham Sabry

Image.alt: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Andras Virag vs. Adham Sabry
KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Andras Virag vs. Adham Sabry
KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Andras Virag vs. Adham Sabry

Video.summary: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

Video.summary: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.
Video.title: M1Challenge76_MestoevVSLyagu.mp4

Video.summary: Chris Smeltzer's journey into MMA began 12 years ago, through Karate. Chris' work as a School Bus driver fits perfectly with his MMA lifestyle, allowing him the flexibility to train throughout the day, as well run a karate school for kids. The martial artist lifestyle helped bring structure to all areas of Chris' life. He believes he has become a better person through Martial Arts, and he makes the mental distinction between between being a fighter and being Martial Artist. He prefers the standup game feels he is progressing well to being an all around fighter with his BJJ Blue Belt.
Video.grandparentTitle: Out of the Cage - Chris Smeltzer
Video.title: Out of the Cage - Chris Smeltzer

Image.alt: Out of the Cage - Chris Smeltzer
Out of the Cage - Chris Smeltzer
Out of the Cage - Chris Smeltzer

Video.summary: Cody Clarke makes a living in the construction field, doing finishing works. This often leaves only the nights, when he is already exhausted, as the only time to fit in his training. Always drawn to MMA, he started competing in small Muay Thai tournaments and eventually progressed to amateur MMA. He has the skill and technique, of a Light Heavyweight, and has been able to maintain his speed even after moving to the Heavyweight category, making his heavy punches that much more dangerous.
Video.grandparentTitle: Day in the Life of a Fighter - Cody Clarke
